'''Fathoms''' was a large entertainment establishment located on eight levels of the [[Glitter Cay tower]] in [[Wildwater City]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. It was owned by a female [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] named [[Odanni]].

It actually consisted of four separate businesses:
*Fathoms was a restaurant with fine dining operated by Odanni
*The [[HyperDive Cantina]] was a bar run by [[Baydo Chasdy]]
*[[Wave Works]] was a gift shop run by [[Jund Voon]]
*The [[Seabed Lodge]] was a luxurious hotel
